is there any difference between implementations of div64_s64() and div_s64() ?

No, there is no difference between the implementations of `div64_s64()` and `div_s64()` other than the naming. Both functions perform the same logic and provide the same result. They handle signed division using bitwise shifting and perform division on 64-bit operands. The `div64_s64()` function is just a modified version of `div_s64()` to handle 64-bit operands for both the dividend and divisor parameters.
